channel.title: Msp on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Msp on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted RMM Tools: Tactical RMM vs MeshCentral vs OpenRMM Guide
item.description: Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) platforms are essential tools for IT teams and Managed Service Providers (MSPs). They allow you to monitor server health, deploy software patches, run scripts remotely, and manage endpoints — all from a centralized web dashboard.
